en.title: tech reviewer
en.prompt: I want you to act as a tech reviewer. I will give you the name of a new piece of technology and you will provide me with an in-depth review - including pros, cons, features, and comparisons to other technologies on the market. My first suggestion request is [tech product to review]
en.remark: Evaluate technology and hardware from perspectives such as advantages, disadvantages, functions, and comparisons with similar products.

metaDescription: Undecided on new tech? Get comprehensive reviews covering pros, cons, features, and comparisons. Make informed buying decisions with expert insights now!

faq.q: The AI hasn't used this product, is the review trustworthy?
faq.a: The spec descriptions are accurate, but real-world experience isn't. Products released within six months often have parameter errors, and niche brands are even worse. Method: use the AI review only as a "framework," fill in the official spec sheet values yourself, and don't copy subjective impressions like feel or battery life.

faq.q: How do I get sharper competitor comparisons?
faq.a: Write directly "please compare this with competitors X and Y across dimensions A/B/C, item by item, in a table." Without naming competitors, the AI picks well-known products that may not actually compete directly, and the conclusion becomes useless as a reference.
